intro: The clearest difference between Sentry and Rollbar is pricing — Sentry is freemium (has a free tier), while Rollbar is subscription with a free tier. Beyond that, lock-in — Sentry has low lock-in (Low — open-source, self-hosted option, OTel-compatible), whereas Rollbar has low lock-in (Error data exportable). Sentry fits error tracking and crash reporting for any platform; Rollbar fits mobile. On the strengths side, Sentry is cited for error tracking and crash reporting for any platform, while Rollbar is cited for mobile and web apps in production. The honest trade-off: Sentry is the wrong call for full APM with infrastructure monitoring; Rollbar is the wrong call for pre-launch, Simple projects; Sentry users flag full APM with infrastructure monitoring, and Rollbar users flag Pre-launch/beta apps. Choosing between them should come down to the constraint that actually binds your workflow, not surface-level overlap. On developer experience the data shows Sentry at 5/5 and Rollbar at 5/5, with transparency at 4/5 and 5/5 respectively.
quick_take: Sentry is for error tracking and crash reporting; Rollbar is for mobile; decide based on pricing model.
verdict_a: Choose Sentry if your use case is error tracking and crash reporting for any platform, and a freemium (has a free tier) pricing shape fits your budget better than subscription with a free tier.
verdict_b: Choose Rollbar if your use case is mobile, and a subscription with a free tier pricing shape fits your budget better than freemium (has a free tier).

faq.a: Sentry is freemium with a free tier, while Rollbar is subscription with a free tier, so the cheaper option depends on your usage shape. Listed pricing pages usually change, so check both directly before committing. For small teams, the free-tier limits often matter more than headline prices.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Sentry to Rollbar?
faq.a: Migrating from Sentry to Rollbar is feasible when their scopes overlap, but the work is in re-mapping configuration, data models, and integrations. Sentry has low lock-in, so exporting state is typically straightforward. Plan for a dual-run period so you can validate parity before decommissioning.

Sentry and Rollbar score the same on developer experience (5/5 each) in our data. Choose based on which workflow, docs style, and CLI ergonomics feel closer to your team's preferences. Trial both in a small project before committing.

faq.q: Is Rollbar a good alternative to Sentry?
faq.a: Rollbar is a reasonable alternative to Sentry when Rollbar fits mobile. If your use case matches Sentry's sweet spot — error tracking and crash reporting for any platform — staying with Sentry is probably safer. Sentry itself is not meant for full APM with infrastructure monitoring, which is often where users start shopping for alternatives.
